tools.name: download_head
tools.description:
HEAD request to inspect a download URL (Content-Type, size, Last-Modified).

Use this before pulling a file — many of the procurement/cohesion
datasets are >100 MB.

tools.name: download_file
tools.description:
Download a file. Small ones come back base64-encoded; large ones return URL + size.

Default cap is 256 KiB. Increase `max_bytes` only when you need the
contents (e.g. CSV under a few MB). For multi-MB ANAC / OpenCoesione
bulks, return the URL to the user and let them download directly.

tools.name: anac_list_datasets
tools.description:
List all dataset slugs published on ANAC's open-data portal.

Italian National Anti-Corruption Authority — public procurement data.
About 70 active datasets including OCDS releases, SmartCIG, PNRR/PNC,
SOA certifications and Qualificazione Imprese.

Returns slugs you can pass to anac_get_dataset for full details.

outputSchema.description: Generic wrapper for non-object return types.

tools.name: anac_search_datasets
tools.description:
Full-text search ANAC datasets.

Args:
    query: free-text query (Italian). Empty = list newest.
    tag: filter by tag. Known tags: 'cig', 'pnrr', 'lavori pubblici',
        'Qualificazione Imprese'.
    rows: page size (default 25, max 1000).
    start: 0-based offset for pagination.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: anac_get_dataset
tools.description:
Fetch full metadata + resource download URLs for one ANAC dataset.

Pass the dataset slug or UUID, e.g. 'misurepremiali-pnrrpnc' or
'cig-pnrr-pnc'. Resources are typically published as ZIP archives
containing CSV, JSON and TTL representations.

tools.name: anac_ocds_bulk_url
tools.description:
Return ANAC's monthly OCDS bulk-release URL (no HTTP call).

ANAC publishes one OCDS 1.1 release file per month under a stable
URL. Use this tool to get the URL, then download with
anac_dataset_resource if you need the contents.

tools.name: anac_pnrr_datasets
tools.description:
Convenience: list ANAC datasets mentioning PNRR / PNC.

Typically returns 'misurepremiali-pnrrpnc', 'indicatori-pnrrpnc',
'cig-pnrr-pnc' (CIG records of PNRR/PNC contracts).

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: anac_search_awards
tools.description:
Search individual ANAC contract awards (aggiudicazioni) with filters.

Joins ANAC's award, tender (bando), and winner tables by CIG and returns
per-award rows with: CIG, stazione appaltante, oggetto, aggiudicatario,
P.IVA, importo a base d'asta, importo aggiudicato, ribasso %, data.

Args:
    region: Italian region name, matched against the contracting
        authority's ANAC section (e.g. "Friuli", "Lombardia").
    min_amount/max_amount: award amount bounds in EUR.
    date_from/date_to: award-date bounds, ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
    cpv_prefix: CPV code prefix, e.g. "45" for construction works.
    query: free-text matched against oggetto and stazione appaltante.
    limit: max rows (default 10).

First call downloads ANAC monthly snapshots (~300 MB total) and caches
them as Parquet; subsequent calls are fast. See 'provenance' for the
snapshot date and coverage caveats.

tools.name: anac_awards_by_cup
tools.description:
All ANAC CIGs linked to a given CUP, with winners, amounts and dates.

Resolves the CUP→CIG mapping from ANAC's cumulative ``cup`` table, then
attaches award and winner details. Use this to reconcile a PNRR/cohesion
project (identified by CUP) against its procurement contracts.

tools.name: anac_awards_by_piva
tools.description:
All ANAC awards won by a company, matched on its codice fiscale / P.IVA.

Returns each award (CIG, stazione appaltante, oggetto, amounts, date) plus
the summed awarded value. Coverage is limited to the cached monthly
snapshot window (see 'provenance').

tools.name: anac_award_detail
tools.description:
Full ANAC record for one CIG: tender, award, linked CUP and all soggetti.

Use after finding a CIG (e.g. via anac_search_awards) to get the complete
picture for a single contract, including every participant/winner role and
any linked CUP(s).

tools.name: anac_sa_history
tools.description:
Purchase history of a stazione appaltante from ANAC open data.

Groups aggiudicazioni by year and CPV for a contracting authority
identified by codice fiscale (exact match) or name substring (ILIKE).
Returns total award count and a breakdown by year+CPV.

Args:
    cf_or_name: Codice fiscale (11 digits) or name substring.
    date_from: Award date lower bound, ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
    date_to: Award date upper bound, ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
    limit: Max rows in by_year_cpv (default 200).

tools.name: ted_search
tools.description:
Search EU public-procurement notices (TED v3 Search API).

Args:
    query: TED expert-search syntax. Examples:
        - 'classification-cpv=72000000' (IT services)
        - 'place-of-performance=ITA AND notice-type=CN' (Italian
          contract notices)
        - 'buyer-name="ASL ROMA 1"'
        - 'publication-date>=20260101 AND publication-date<=20260131'
        - '*' (all notices in scope)
    limit: page size (1-250, default 25).
    page: 1-based page number.
    scope: 'ACTIVE' (default — open notices), 'LAST_EDITION', or 'ALL'.
    fields: list of TED field names to return; defaults to a sensible set
        (publication-number, notice-title, buyer-name, publication-date,
        place-of-performance, classification-cpv, deadline-receipt-tender-date-lot,
        notice-type, links).

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: ted_pin_italy
tools.description:
Search Italian Prior Information Notices (PIN) on TED.

PINs signal upcoming procurements before the formal call for tender.
This tool always scopes to Italy (place-of-performance=ITA) and
notice-type=PIN.

Args:
    cpv_codes: CPV codes to filter by (e.g. ['71000000'] for engineering services).
               Multiple codes are OR-joined.
    nuts_region: NUTS-1 prefix (e.g. 'ITC' for Nord-Ovest, 'ITI' for Centro) or
                 NUTS-2 code (e.g. 'ITC4' for Lombardia, 'ITF4' for Puglia). NUTS-1
                 prefixes are automatically expanded to an OR of their NUTS-2 children.
    deadline_before: filter to PINs whose consultation deadline is on or before
                     this date in YYYYMMDD format.
    limit: page size (1-250, default 25).
    page: 1-based page number.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: ted_get_notice_xml
tools.description:
Download the official XML of a TED notice by publication number.

Publication numbers have the format 'NNNNNN-YYYY' (e.g. '178103-2016').
The XML is the authoritative format (eForms for notices ≥ 2024-04,
TED R2.0.9 for earlier ones).

tools.name: dati_search
tools.description:
Search Italian national open-data catalog (dati.gov.it).

Args:
    query: free-text query (Italian preferred).
    organization: publisher slug. Use dati_organizations to find these
        — the slug for ISTAT is 'istituto-nazionale-di-statistica-istat',
        for INPS is 'inps'.
    group: theme slug. Valid values: agricoltura, ambiente, cultura,
        economia, energia, giustizia, governo, internazionali, regioni,
        salute, scienza, societa, trasporti.
    format: filter by resource format (CSV, JSON, ZIP, XLSX, SHP, RDF…).
    rows: page size (default 25, max 1000).
    start: 0-based offset for pagination.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: dati_get_dataset
tools.description: Fetch full metadata + resources for a dati.gov.it dataset by slug or UUID.

tools.name: dati_organizations
tools.description:
List up to `limit` publisher slugs registered on dati.gov.it.

Useful for finding the exact slug needed by `dati_search(organization=...)`.

outputSchema.description: Generic wrapper for non-object return types.

tools.name: dati_groups
tools.description: List the 13 official thematic groups on dati.gov.it (no HTTP call).

outputSchema.description: Generic wrapper for non-object return types.

tools.name: opencoesione_list_datasets
tools.description:
Curated catalog of OpenCoesione bulk downloads (no HTTP call).

OpenCoesione publishes investment-project data for Italian cohesion
funds (FESR, FSE, FSC, …) by cycle and region. Each entry includes
ZIP and Parquet download URLs and a landing-page link.

Use this to find the right URL, then call opencoesione_download
to fetch the file.

outputSchema.description: Generic wrapper for non-object return types.

tools.name: opencoesione_describe_dataset
tools.description:
Fetch full metadata for one OpenCoesione dataset by its id.

Use opencoesione_list_datasets to discover valid ids (e.g. 'progetti_esteso',
'progetti_esteso_2021-2027', 'progetti_esteso_lom').
Raises an error if the id is not found in the curated catalog.

tools.name: opencoesione_download_parquet
tools.description:
Return the Parquet download URL for an OpenCoesione dataset.

Not all datasets have a Parquet format; regional datasets are ZIP-only.
Raises an error if the dataset has no Parquet URL or is not found.

tools.name: opencoesione_search_projects
tools.description:
Query OpenCoesione cohesion projects and get totals + top beneficiaries.

Downloads the cycle's project Parquet bulk once (cached), then returns:
number of projects, totale finanziato / impegnato / pagato, top-5
beneficiaries by financing, and a sample of the largest matching projects.

Args:
    cycle: '2007-2013' | '2014-2020' | '2021-2027' (default latest).
    region: region name, e.g. 'Friuli' (matched on DEN_REGIONE).
    fund: community fund, e.g. 'FESR', 'FSE' (matched on FONDO_COMUNITARIO).
    cup: exact CUP filter.
    query: free-text on project title.
    limit: sample size (default 20).

tools.name: opencoesione_project_by_cup
tools.description:
Find one OpenCoesione project by CUP (scans all cycles).

Returns title, region, fund, beneficiary, and financed/committed/paid
amounts, plus procedural/financial status. Use to check whether a CUP
is present on OpenCoesione and reconcile its amounts against ANAC/PNRR.

tools.name: opencoesione_project_url
tools.description:
Stable detail-page URL for a project, identified by CUP.

Every Italian cohesion-funded project has a CUP (Codice Unico di
Progetto) and a permalink at
opencoesione.gov.it/{lang}/progetti/{cup}.

tools.name: opencoesione_search_url
tools.description:
Build a deep-link search URL for the public OpenCoesione frontend.

Use when the user wants to browse projects matching free-text criteria
without downloading the whole dataset.

tools.name: italiadomani_catalog
tools.description:
Try to extract downloadable PNRR datasets from ItaliaDomani's catalog.

The official catalog is loaded by a JavaScript component sitting
behind Akamai, so a server-side fetch often returns 0 items. When
that happens, use `italiadomani_via_dati_gov_it` (programmatic
alternative) or send the user to the landing page.

tools.name: italiadomani_landing
tools.description:
Return a stable landing-page URL for a major ItaliaDomani section.

Valid `section` values: missioni, investimenti, riforme,
milestone_target, indicatori_comuni_europei, regis, dnsh,
bandi_titolari, bandi_attuatori, andamento_piano, documenti.

tools.name: italiadomani_via_dati_gov_it
tools.description:
Build a dati.gov.it search URL filtered to ItaliaDomani / PNRR datasets.

dati.gov.it harvests ItaliaDomani's open data and exposes it via
CKAN — much more reliable than scraping the AEM frontend.

tools.name: openpnrr_endpoints
tools.description: List OpenPNRR REST endpoints (missioni, misure, scadenze, progetti, …).

tools.name: openpnrr_list
tools.description:
List items from one OpenPNRR endpoint with cursor pagination.

Valid endpoints: missioni, componenti, misure, scadenze, organizzazioni,
territori, temi, priorita, progetti.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: openpnrr_get
tools.description: Fetch full detail for one OpenPNRR item by id.

tools.name: openpnrr_search_progetti
tools.description:
Search PNRR-tracked projects on OpenPNRR.

Args:
    cup: a CUP to resolve. NOTE: OpenPNRR's API has no server-side CUP
        filter, so this is a bounded client-side scan. If the CUP is not
        found, the response sets cup_filter_supported=false — do NOT
        retry; use anac_awards_by_cup / opencoesione_project_by_cup
        instead to resolve a CUP.
    query: free-text query (matches project title/description).
    limit: page size for free-text/listing (default 25).
    page: 1-based page number (free-text/listing only).

tools.name: consip_search_bandi
tools.description:
Search Consip tender notices (scrapes /imprese/bandi).

Args:
    query: free-text search across notice title/summary.
    stage: optional gating stage. One of: annunci, bando, chiarimenti,
        aggiudicata, ricorso, sospesa, revocata.
    page: 0-based page number (Drupal-style).

tools.name: consip_search_consultazioni
tools.description:
Search Consip consultazioni di mercato (market consultations).

Scrapes the /imprese/informazioni-operative/consultazioni-di-mercato page.
These are exploratory market soundings, distinct from formal bandi.
Returns an empty list (not an error) if the page layout does not match
the expected card selectors.

Args:
    query: free-text search term (e.g. "cloud", "cybersecurity").

tools.name: marche_list_datasets
tools.description:
List CCIAA Marche open-data datasets (parsed from the RSS feed).

Note: despite the name, these datasets cover **all Italian provinces**
(the CCIAA delle Marche publishes them on behalf of the Italian
Chambers-of-Commerce system, using InfoCamere data).

tools.name: marche_fetch_jsonstat
tools.description:
Download a JSON-stat dataset hosted at opendata.marche.camcom.it/data/.

Use after `marche_list_datasets` to retrieve the actual statistics.
Output is the raw JSON-stat object — parse with the json-stat
library on the client side.

tools.name: mef_taxpayer_scopes
tools.description: Return the MEF taxpayer-scope codes (search_contrib values).

tools.name: mef_classifications
tools.description: Return the breakdown variables (search_class) available on MEF stats.

tools.name: mef_search_link
tools.description:
Build a deep-link to MEF fiscal statistics.

Args:
    contrib: taxpayer scope code (default IMPRE — corporate / businesses).
        Valid: see mef_taxpayer_scopes.
    classification: breakdown variable (see mef_classifications).
    tree: high-level grouping letter (A, B, C, D, BB).
    page: 1-based page number.

Returns a URL that loads the matching HTML statistics table with
CSV/XLSX export buttons.

tools.name: env_va_search_link
tools.description:
Build a deep-link URL to search the national VAS-VIA-AIA portal (MASE).

Args:
    procedure_type: VIA | VAS | AIA | Verifica
    region: Italian region name (e.g. 'Lazio')
    year: 4-digit year
    proponent: name of the proponent organisation

tools.name: env_er_search_link
tools.description: Build a deep-link URL to search Emilia-Romagna's VIA-VAS portal.

tools.name: env_regional_search_link
tools.description:
Build a deep-link URL for a regional Italian VIA/VAS portal.

Covers: Veneto, Lombardia, Piemonte, Lazio.
For Emilia-Romagna use env_er_search_link. For national use env_va_search_link.

Args:
    region: Italian region name (case-insensitive).
    procedure_type: VIA | VAS | AIA | Verifica
    proponent: name of the proponent organisation

tools.name: env_probe_va
tools.description:
Probe whether the national VAS-VIA-AIA search is currently enabled.

The ministry has periodically disabled programmatic search for
security reviews. Use this before recommending the search link.

tools.name: programmazione_search_biennale
tools.description:
Search the curated registry of Italian regional biennale/triennale planning datasets.

Returns entries from the in-memory registry — no HTTP call.
Each entry contains a download URL pointing to the institutional portal where
the planning document is published.

Args:
    cpv: CPV code prefix to filter by (e.g. '71000000' for engineering services).
         NOTE: CPV filtering is advisory — the registry does not store lot-level CPV
         data; the returned URLs must be inspected to confirm CPV coverage.
    regione: Italian region name (e.g. 'Puglia', 'Lombardia') to filter by.
    anno: Planning cycle start year (e.g. 2024, 2025) to filter by.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

total.description: Total matching items if the source reports it.

offset.description: 0-based offset of the first returned item.

next_offset.description: Offset to pass back for the next page, or null at end.

items.description: The actual items; shape depends on the source.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the result (truncation, etc.).

tools.name: imprese_search_link
tools.description:
Build a Ricerca Imprese deep-link to the public Registro Imprese search.

The InfoCamere site does not expose a free programmatic API; this tool
constructs the search-page URL so a human can complete the lookup.
For full programmatic access, a Telemaco subscription is required.

tools.name: imprese_check_vat
tools.description:
Validate a VAT number with the EU VIES service.

Free, no auth. Returns is_valid plus registered name/address when
available. Works for any EU member-state (IT for Italian companies).

Examples:
    imprese_check_vat("IT", "00811720158")
    imprese_check_vat("DE", "123456789")

tools.name: imprese_telemaco_status
tools.description: Report whether Telemaco (paid InfoCamere API) credentials are configured.
